SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Class AIcVersionInterval

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AIcInterval<AIcVersion>
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcVersionInterval
All Implemented Interfaces:
eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AIiInterval<AIcVersion>, Serializable
public class AIcVersionInterval extends eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AIcInterval<AIcVersion>

Title: AIcVersionInterval

Description: Type-safe interval implementation for AIcVersion values.

Notes:

  • This class provides interval operations that can use a specific AIiVersionScheme comparator.
  • The base AIcInterval validation uses AIcVersion.compareTo(AIcVersion); for scheme-specific ordering you should use the constructor that accepts a AIiVersionScheme.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form
Date:
28.01.26

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AIcVersionInterval(eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aLeftBoundary, AIcVersion aLeftValue, eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aRightBoundary, AIcVersion aRightValue)
    Creates a new version interval validated using AIcVersion.compareTo(AIcVersion) (default scheme).
    AIcVersionInterval(eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aLeftBoundary, AIcVersion aLeftValue, eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aRightBoundary, AIcVersion aRightValue, AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
    Creates a new version interval validated using the comparator of the provided scheme.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    contains(AIcVersion aValue, AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
    Returns true if the given value is contained within this interval using the comparator from the scheme.
    AIcVersionInterval
    intersect(AIcVersionInterval aOther, AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
    Computes intersection of this interval with another interval using the comparator from the scheme.
    boolean
    overlaps(AIcVersionInterval aOther, AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
    Returns true if this interval overlaps the other interval using the comparator from the scheme.
    AIcVersionInterval
    tryIntersect(AIcVersionInterval aOther, AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
    Attempts to compute intersection of this interval with another interval using the comparator from the scheme.

  • Constructor Details

    • AIcVersionInterval

      public AIcVersionInterval(@Nonnull eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aLeftBoundary, @Nullable AIcVersion aLeftValue, @Nonnull eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aRightBoundary, @Nullable AIcVersion aRightValue)
      Creates a new version interval validated using AIcVersion.compareTo(AIcVersion) (default scheme).
      Parameters:
      aLeftBoundary - left boundary
      aLeftValue - left value
      aRightBoundary - right boundary
      aRightValue - right value

    • AIcVersionInterval

      public AIcVersionInterval(@Nonnull eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aLeftBoundary, @Nullable AIcVersion aLeftValue, @Nonnull eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AInIntervalBoundary aRightBoundary, @Nullable AIcVersion aRightValue, @Nonnull AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
      Creates a new version interval validated using the comparator of the provided scheme.
      Parameters:
      aLeftBoundary - left boundary
      aLeftValue - left value
      aRightBoundary - right boundary
      aRightValue - right value
      aVersionScheme - scheme defining ordering semantics

  • Method Details

    • contains

      public boolean contains(@Nonnull AIcVersion aValue, @Nonnull AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
      Returns true if the given value is contained within this interval using the comparator from the scheme.
      Parameters:
      aValue - value to test
      aVersionScheme - scheme defining ordering semantics
      Returns:
      true if contained

    • overlaps

      public boolean overlaps(@Nonnull AIcVersionInterval aOther, @Nonnull AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
      Returns true if this interval overlaps the other interval using the comparator from the scheme.
      Parameters:
      aOther - other interval
      aVersionScheme - scheme defining ordering semantics
      Returns:
      true if overlap exists

    • intersect

      @Nonnull public AIcVersionInterval intersect(@Nonnull AIcVersionInterval aOther, @Nonnull AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
      Computes intersection of this interval with another interval using the comparator from the scheme.
      Parameters:
      aOther - other interval
      aVersionScheme - scheme defining ordering semantics
      Returns:
      intersection
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when intervals do not overlap

    • tryIntersect

      @Nullable public AIcVersionInterval tryIntersect(@Nonnull AIcVersionInterval aOther, @Nonnull AIiVersionScheme aVersionScheme)
      Attempts to compute intersection of this interval with another interval using the comparator from the scheme.
      Parameters:
      aOther - other interval
      aVersionScheme - scheme defining ordering semantics
      Returns:
      intersection or null if no overlap
